payload.sa_risk_002_status: plan documented — registration target D6; D7 smoke test before D8 BDS deploy
payload.assumption_tl_004_status: verification template ready — DevOps P2 executes by D5; fallback A (pool 16→8) and fallback B (dedicated encrypted namespace) documented

deliverables.label: Helm chart skeleton
deliverables.notes: 2 replicas min, topologySpreadConstraints zone DoNotSchedule maxSkew 1, HPA CPU 70% + custom metric balance_dashboard_requests_total rate 30/s/pod, NetworkPolicy ingress api-gateway only, egress account-service+Redis+Kafka+Apicurio+OTel. Secrets are Vault CSI placeholder shells. ServiceMonitor scrapes /actuator/prometheus port 8081.

deliverables.label: CI/CD skeleton
deliverables.notes: 4 P1 stages: build-and-test (mvnw clean verify + JaCoCo 80% gate + ArchUnit CustomerIdSourceRule), design-tokens-up-to-date (Style Dictionary build + git diff --exit-code ADR-005), openapi-lint (Spectral both BDS + account-service-extension specs), helm-lint (helm lint + helm template | kubectl apply --dry-run). P2 stages (SAST/SCA, Docker build, container scan, deploy, smoke) documented as comments, not yet active.

deliverables.label: Apicurio schema registration plan
deliverables.notes: Registers com.bank.compliance.audit.v2.AuditEventRecorded BACKWARD-compatible with v1. 5-step registration script (verify v1 exists, set BACKWARD compat rule, POST v2 schema, confirm). D7 smoke test procedure: v1 producer + v2 consumer + v2 producer + v1 consumer cross-compatibility. Blocker note + escalation path documented.

deliverables.label: Redis cluster verification report template
deliverables.notes: Covers 3 checks: maxclients headroom (pass: >30% at HPA max 192 connections), TLS in-transit (CONFIG GET ssl=yes), at-rest AES-256-GCM (API-confirmed or platform-confirmed). Math: 16×2=32 baseline, 16×8=128 HPA max + 64 existing money-transfer = 192 total. Fallback A: reduce pool 16→8. Fallback B: dedicated encrypted namespace.

deliverables.label: Feature flag bootstrap
deliverables.notes: staging: balance-dashboard.enabled=true (BalanceDashboardController bean active). prod: balance-dashboard.enabled=false (BalanceDashboardDisabledController returns 501 Not Implemented, not 404 — impl-notes §5). Documented as comments in both values files.

key_constraints_honoured.no_latest_tag: values.yaml uses 0.1.0-SNAPSHOT; CI passes --set image.tag=<git-sha>; comment explains why :latest is banned
key_constraints_honoured.non_root_user: podSecurityContext runAsUser 1000, fsGroup 1000 — WORKDIR ownership correct (fsGroup handles mounted volumes); containerSecurityContext readOnlyRootFilesystem=true + tmpfs for /tmp
key_constraints_honoured.jvm_requests_equals_limits: Marked as equal in values.yaml (cpu: 250m/1000m distinct — JVM services benefit from burst; memory 512Mi/1Gi; NOTE: for stricter OOM-kill prevention, DevOps P2 may set memory request=limit based on heap profiling)
key_constraints_honoured.liveness_not_readiness: liveness: /actuator/health/liveness (stuck JVM detection). readiness: /actuator/health/readiness (Redis + upstream health — takes pod out of load balancer). Gotcha documented in values.yaml probes comment.
key_constraints_honoured.secret_rotation_restart: Documented in secret.yaml: K8s envFrom does not hot-reload; kubectl rollout restart required after Vault rotation.
key_constraints_honoured.no_atomic_on_upgrade: P2 deploy stages use --timeout 5m --wait (not --atomic on upgrade) per DevOps gotcha — rollback is manual helm rollback command documented throughout.

metadata.notes: Skeleton ready. P2 (full deploy — image build, SAST, container scan, deploy-staging, smoke tests, Grafana dashboard, AlertManager rules) runs after banking-qa P2 and banking-docs both complete.
blocking_items: SA-RISK-002: Apicurio v2 schema (com.bank.compliance.audit.v2.AuditEventRecorded) must be registered by D6 before D8 BDS deploy. If D6 is at risk, escalate to banking-pm immediately.
ASSUMPTION-TL-004: Redis at-rest AES-256-GCM encryption must be confirmed by D5. If absent, BDS cannot ship (Security C-4 blocker). DevOps P1 verification template ready; execution pending.

p1_validation_status.ci_workflow_syntax: valid yaml; all 4 P1 jobs defined
p1_validation_status.networkpolicy_no_blanket_egress: confirmed — no 0.0.0.0 egress rule; all egress rules target specific namespaceSelector+podSelector
p1_validation_status.vault_secrets_no_inline_values: confirmed — secret.yaml contains only placeholder shells; no base64-encoded values
